subcodes.first_line: O Essence of pure and ethereal camphor, Ancient and Most Exalted One, Who hath adorned with embellishments the very emblems of adornment [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: هو العطوف الرحیم الرؤف الکریم. طراز جوهر مجرد کافور ساذج عال ازل الذی طرز من استطرازو طرز تطریز طرازات اطراز طراز
subcodes.subjects: @transcendence; unknowability of God, @servitude; submission to God; repentance, @prayer for forgiveness, @evanescence and eternality; fana and baqa
